name: online-bp-t4-naive
description: item 27.3 GEPA counter-arm (naive fixed edit) — keeps the negative honest. A generic, content-free 'be thorough and careful' nudge with no reflection-derived insight. If this moves the shaped T4 mean as much as the reflection-targeted cand-verify, then any apparent gain is from APPENDING-anything, not from the reflector's diagnosis — mirroring the item-20 bare/counter-arm discipline. Text lever only; serve fields pinned to the online optimisee.
rules_append:
# Note

- Please be thorough and careful, and do a good job on this task.
